description: The Audi RS4, produced across multiple generations since 2000, is the high-performance version of the A4. The B5 generation featured a 2.7-litre twin-turbo V6, while the B7 introduced a naturally aspirated 4.2-litre V8 revving to 8,250 rpm. The B7 Avant with its howling V8 is the most collectible.
